modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into Office 365 WebMail account

full_description_text:
- User is trying to log into their Office 365 WebMail account.  
- When entering username and password, the page refreshes without any error message.  
- User is unable to access Outlook e-mail and sees a message about no mailbox and no license assigned.
short_description: Unable to log into Office 365 WebMail account
description:
